## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pod stand-up to discuss client updates, workflow challenges, and product improvement ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zooplo ending contract; focus on delivering remaining SEO pages and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Clients seeking strategy resets; team encouraged to be more proactive in strategic guidance](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Atlas workflow improvements noted; team adapting to programmatic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [New feature ideas for Atlas discussed; team encouraged to submit feedback via Linear](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)

## Topics

### Client Updates and Strategy Shifts

  - [Zooplo ending contract due to company pivot; focusing on GTM strategy reset](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Good Calls, Aftershoot, and Prophecy seeking strategy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Team encouraged to be more proactive in strategic guidance, less order-taking](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Low risk in client turnover; opportunity to be bold with new approaches](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)

### Workflow Challenges and Improvements

  - [Carrie feeling overwhelmed with manual tasks, especially for Zooplo and Good Calls](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Atlas Product Feedback and Ideas

  - [Ehtisham suggested creating an all-in-one workspace within Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Matt requested drag-and-drop functionality for row organization](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Team encouraged to submit feature requests and bug reports via Linear](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Team Availability and Holidays

  - [Darrell less available due to directors' offsite, but catching up over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/nXNbdA4_bEZ3AVuo7e6AKWtXHPUfv3Dj?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
